description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in autonomous mode was traveling north on Harrison St. The Zoox vehicle began coming to a gradual stop for traffic ahead 
when it was rear ended by vehicle 2 at low speed. There was minor damage and police were not called. The Zoox operator reported a "sore 
neck and back."
Print
Clear Form
